summary: GST handling for Purchase Invoices and Project Settings GST Toggle fully tested. All 13 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Purchase Invoice form shows GST fields (HSN Code, CGST%, SGST%, IGST%), Settings tab shows GST toggle with GST Number input. GST calculations are correct in backend.
passed_tests: Backend: Auth verification - Admin session valid
Backend: Create purchase invoice with GST fields (hsn_code, cgst_percent, sgst_percent, igst_percent)
Backend: GST amounts correctly calculated (CGST=1170, SGST=1170, Total GST=2340, Grand Total=15340)
Backend: Get invoice with GST - line item GST fields persisted correctly
Backend: Update invoice with IGST - GST recalculated correctly (IGST=1800, Grand Total=11800)
Backend: Create invoice without GST - works correctly (Grand Total = Gross Total)
Backend: Get invoice without GST - GST fields are null/0
Backend: Get project settings - gst_applicable field returned
Backend: Enable GST toggle - settings saved successfully
Backend: Verify GST settings persisted - gst_applicable=true, gst_number=22AAAAA0000A1Z5
Backend: Invalid GST number format rejected with 400 error
Backend: Create invoice with GST and discount - calculations correct (Gross=10000, Discount=500, Net=9500, GST=1800, Grand=11300)
Frontend: Add Purchase Invoice modal shows GST fields (HSN Code, CGST%, SGST%, IGST%)
Frontend: Settings tab shows GST Settings section with toggle and GST Number input
Frontend: GST Number field appears when toggle is enabled
Frontend: Save Settings button works - shows success toast
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Project GET endpoint was missing gst_applicable and gst_number fields - added to response
VERIFIED: GST calculations in backend are correct - CGST/SGST/IGST calculated per line item
VERIFIED: Grand Total = Net Taxable + Total GST (where Net Taxable = Gross - Discount)
VERIFIED: GST number validation uses correct regex pattern for Indian GST format
VERIFIED: Frontend form correctly sends GST fields to backend API
VERIFIED: Settings tab correctly shows/hides GST Number field based on toggle state
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py (line 3201-3204: added gst_applicable and gst_number to project GET response)
seed_data_creation: Test invoices created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: GST feature for Purchase Invoices fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: POST/PUT /api/finance/execution-ledger (with GST fields), PUT /api/projects/{id}/settings (GST toggle). Frontend components: ExecutionLedger.jsx (Purchase Invoice form with GST fields), ProjectDetails.jsx (Settings tab with GST toggle). GST calculations: CGST/SGST/IGST calculated per line item, Grand Total = Net Taxable + Total GST.

feature_verification_summary.purchase_invoice_gst_create: WORKING - GST fields (hsn_code, cgst_percent, sgst_percent, igst_percent) accepted and calculated correctly
feature_verification_summary.purchase_invoice_gst_display: WORKING - GST amounts and grand_total displayed in expanded invoice view
feature_verification_summary.purchase_invoice_without_gst: WORKING - Invoices without GST work correctly
feature_verification_summary.project_settings_gst_toggle: WORKING - Toggle enables/disables GST for customer invoices, GST Number field with validation
